message:
style(ft-xbnl0.2.4): fmt on tick-408 race test (tick 411)

Reran cargo fmt --check after landing tick 408. rustfmt wanted to
collapse the multi-line cancel_with call inside the tick-408 isolated
race test onto two lines:

  Before:
      cx_for_cancel.cancel_with(
          crate::outcome::CancelKind::User,
          Some("isolated race test"),
      );

  After:
      cx_for_cancel
          .cancel_with(crate::outcome::CancelKind::User, Some("isolated race test"));

Applied the reshape. Re-verified: tick-408 test still passes
(55.5 ms cancel observed), full check script still 88/88 ok.

No semantic changes — pure rustfmt preference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
